content:
# 组合模式：登录页

## 适用场景

用户登录入口页面。顶部 Logo/标题，中部账号、密码输入框，底部登录按钮，可选辅助链接（注册/忘记密码）。

## 组合方式

外层 CombinedView（layoutMode=flex, direction=column, mainAxisAlignment=center）。Logo ImageView/标题 TextView + 账号输入框 + 密码输入框 + 登录按钮 TextView（绑定 onClick）。

## AI Projection 示例

```json
{
  "type": "COMBINEDVIEW",
  "id": "login-page",
  "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
  "size": { "width": 375, "height": 667 },
  "layoutMode": "flex",
  "decoration": { "fill": { "color": "#ffffff" } },
  "flexLayout": { "direction": "column", "mainAxisAlignment": "center", "crossAxisAlignment": "center", "gap": 20, "padding": [0, 32, 0, 32] },
  "children": [
    { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "login-title", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 311, "height": 36 }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "欢迎登录", "style": { "fontSize": 28, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#1a1a1a" } } ], "align": "center" } ] } },
    { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "login-account", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 311, "height": 44 }, "decoration": { "fill": { "color": "#f5f5f5" }, "radius": 8, "border": { "color": "#e0e0e0", "width": 1 } }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "请输入账号", "style": { "fontSize": 15, "color": "#bfbfbf" } } ] } ] } },
    { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "login-password", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 311, "height": 44 }, "decoration": { "fill": { "color": "#f5f5f5" }, "radius": 8, "border": { "color": "#e0e0e0", "width": 1 } }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "请输入密码", "style": { "fontSize": 15, "color": "#bfbfbf" } } ] } ] } },
    { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "login-btn", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 311, "height": 48 }, "decoration": { "fill": { "color": "#1677ff" }, "radius": 24 }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "登录", "style": { "fontSize": 17, "color": "#ffffff", "fontWeight": "bold" } } ], "align": "center" } ] }, "events": { "onClick": null } }
  ]
}
```

## 依赖的 Primitive

primitive-ui-combinedview, primitive-ui-textview

## 说明

- 登录按钮 onClick 绑定一个调用登录云函数的 FlowSchema（见 bindflow 组合模式）。
- 可在底部追加一个 row 方向的 CombinedView，放「注册」「忘记密码」两个 TextView 链接。

metadata.description: 登录页：标题+账号密码输入+登录按钮
